rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing.
Overlines and labels must be uppercase with wide tracking.
Never use Inter or generic sans for headings.

layout_and_spacing.density: Tight (gap-4 or gap-6) for dashboards. Use h-full on children to stretch.
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: Fixed width (e.g., w-64 or w-72), sticky, containing advanced filters.
layout_and_spacing.main_content: Fluid width, dense table or grid for creator search results.
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. Container uses border-collapse style layouts with 1px subtle borders (border-border). Zero or minimal shadow.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp corners (rounded-sm or rounded-none). No heavy shadows. High contrast text.
components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow. Hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow (shadow-md).
components.forms_and_inputs: Shadcn based. Sharp borders. Focus state must have high contrast ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary_action focus:ring-offset-1).
components.tables: Dense rows, left-aligned data, right-aligned metrics (numbers). Explicit hover states on rows (hover:bg-zinc-50).
components.charts: Recharts or Shadcn charts. Use primary action color and neutral greys. Accessible palettes.
components.prospect_score_card: Elevated component. Large bold typography for the 0-100 score. Color-coded based on value (Green > 80, Yellow 50-79, Red < 50).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-zinc-900 hover:text-white).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties (transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease). No 'transition-all'.
motion_and_interactions.loading_states: Use skeleton loaders matching the exact dimensions of the expected content.

icons.usage: Use Phosphor Icons (Regular or Bold weight) for dense dashboards to maintain clarity at small sizes.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text and 3:1 for large text.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (kebab-case, role-based). e.g., data-testid='search-input', data-testid='export-csv-button'.

media_and_assets.instructions_to_main_agent: Use these exact URLs for mocked creator avatars and data. NEVER use placeholder text or dummyimage.com.
